= Contents =
    - [[#BREW|BREW]]
            - [[#BREW#tips & tricks|tips & tricks]]
                - [[#BREW#tips & tricks#downgrade package|downgrade package]]
                - [[#BREW#tips & tricks#prevent package from upgrading|prevent package from upgrading]]

= BREW =

=== tips & tricks ===

==== downgrade package ====
{{{
  brew search <package name>
}}}
Older/specific versions are marked with `@`
{{{
  brew install <package>@<version>
  brew unlink <old package>
  brew link --force --overwrite <new package>
}}}
Also it's a good idea to [[#prevent package from upgrading|prevent package from upgrading]]

==== prevent package from upgrading ====
{{{
  brew pin <package>
}}}
